sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, str1 TEXT, str2 TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'duck', 'luck');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (2, 'cat', 'bat');
SELECT id, jaccard(str1, str2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET str1 = 'duckling' WHERE id = 1;
